summary: Wallet/system credential stealer with hardcoded GitHub Pages C2
details: Package advertises itself as a DeFi threat scanner but ships three modules (scanner.js, wallet-scanner.js, build-verifier.js) that combine system reconnaissance with outbound exfiltration to a hardcoded attacker endpoint. scanner.js (line 161, 323) hardcodes the C2 host https://ddjidd564.github.io and posts host data collected via os.hostname(), execSync('whoami'), and filesystem probes. wallet-scanner.js performs filesystem enumeration paired with multiple POST/curl exfiltration paths, consistent with browser-wallet/seed-phrase scraping. build-verifier.js collects hostname, username, and cwd into a JSON body and posts it via https.request. The combination of (a) hardcoded non-publisher C2 on a free-hosting throwaway GitHub Pages account, (b) child_process + curl/execSync exfiltration primitives, and (c) wallet/filesystem enumeration is unambiguous credential/wallet theft on the installer's machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
